---
title: "Project Report"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

## Overview

This is a starter Quarto report.

## Pipeline outputs

- Model artifact: `artifacts/models/model.rds`
- Predictions: `artifacts/data/preds.rds`
- Fraud/credit-risk validation report: `artifacts/reports/model_validation_report.md`

## Fraud And Credit-Risk Validation

The pipeline now validates a binary fraud or credit-risk target with Logistic Regression and optional Random Forest/XGBoost challenger models when those packages are available. The validation layer reports ROC-AUC, PR-AUC, KS score, PSI, tuned threshold results, confusion matrix metrics, feature importance, and approve/investigate/reject decision counts.

## Notes

Render with:

```r
# install.packages("quarto") # if needed
# quarto::quarto_render("reports/report.qmd")
```
